from jinja2 import Environment, FileSystemLoader

env = Environment(loader=FileSystemLoader("templates"))

home_template = env.get_template("home.html")
dashboard_template = env.get_template("dashboard.html")
admin_template = env.get_template("admin.html")
report_template = env.get_template("report.html")
settings_template = env.get_template("settings.html")

def render_home(request):
    return home_template.render(title="Home")
